description: Deterministic audit rules evaluated by the auditor agent. Pipeline rules (RULE-xxx) are mechanical certification gates. Compliance rules (AUD-xxx) are artifact-level checks from the PSB Constitution (PSB-CONST-001). Both series are authoritative at their respective scopes.
pipeline_rules_scope: Mechanical certification pipeline — evaluated during Garage stages 1-10. BLOCKING severity halts certification.
compliance_rules_scope: Artifact compliance — evaluated by the Auditor agent (stage 8) against hub definition artifacts. CRITICAL/HIGH violations block compliance.

rules.name: file_target_containment
rules.description: All modified files must be within WORK_PACKET.file_targets. No files outside declared targets may be modified.

rules.name: acceptance_criteria_met
rules.description: Every criterion in WORK_PACKET.acceptance_criteria must evaluate to true.

rules.name: required_artifacts_present
rules.description: Every artifact in WORK_PACKET.required_artifacts must exist in PR branch.

rules.name: schema_impact_ctb_validation
rules.description: When schema_impact=true, all CTB registry gates must pass: column_registry.yml updated, migration file present, sub-hub cardinality valid (1 CANONICAL + 1 ERROR per sub-hub).

rules.name: ctb_branch_compliance
rules.description: All new files must reside within valid CTB branches (sys/, data/, app/, ai/, ui/) or approved support surfaces (docs/, scripts/, .github/workflows/, migrations/).

rules.name: forbidden_folder_absence
rules.description: No files may exist in forbidden folders: utils/, helpers/, common/, shared/, lib/, misc/.

rules.name: protected_asset_boundary
rules.description: Protected assets (doctrine files, constitutional docs, locked templates) must not be modified by worker execution. Modification requires architectural elevation.

rules.name: no_governance_in_car
rules.description: Child repos must not contain agent definitions, WORK_PACKET schema, audit taxonomy, doctrine registry, or execution contracts. Governance lives in the Garage only.

rules.name: execution_type_consistency
rules.description: Actual changes must be consistent with declared execution_type. Audit must not modify files. Migrate must include migration SQL. Build may create new files. Refactor must not add capabilities.

rules.name: artifact_hash_integrity
rules.description: SHA-256 hash of required artifacts (sorted alphabetically, concatenated as bytes) must match certification.artifact_hash.

rules.name: signature_valid
rules.description: Certification auditor_signature must validate against garage signing key using HMAC-SHA256.

rules.name: no_unregistered_repo_pull
rules.description: All repository mounts must resolve through repo_registry.json. Raw URL pulls are blocked unless repo_pull_policy.allow_raw_url=true. Unknown aliases, disabled repos, and disallowed branches are rejected. mount_receipt must be present and valid.
rules.evaluation: mount_receipt.resolution_method === 'alias' AND mount_receipt.resolved_alias ∈ repo_registry.repos[enabled=true] AND mount_receipt.resolved_branch ∈ repo_registry.repos[alias].allowed_branches

rules.name: mount_integrity_check
rules.description: Mount receipt must confirm commit-level integrity. mount_receipt must exist, detached_head must be false, and resolved_commit_sha must equal remote_head_sha. Any mismatch indicates a corrupted or stale clone.

compliance_rules.name: HEIR_COMPLETENESS
compliance_rules.description: All 8 HEIR fields must be present and valid: sovereign_ref, hub_id, ctb_placement, imo_topology, cc_layer, services, secrets_provider, acceptance_criteria.

compliance_rules.name: ORBT_MODE_DECLARED
compliance_rules.description: ORBT mode must be present and valid (Operate, Repair, Build, Troubleshoot, Train). Checked as Phase 0 before any other validation. No inference permitted.

compliance_rules.name: CTB_PLACEMENT_VALID
compliance_rules.description: All files must reside in valid CTB branches (sys/, data/, app/, ai/, ui/) or approved support surfaces.

compliance_rules.name: TRANSFORMATION_LAW_SATISFIED
compliance_rules.description: Every artifact must be reducible to: 'This transforms X constants into Y variables.' If it cannot be stated in those terms, it may not exist.

compliance_rules.name: IMO_VIOLATION
compliance_rules.description: No logic in Ingress (schema validation only). No logic in Egress (read-only views only). All logic in Middle only. Covers IMO-01 through IMO-06.

compliance_rules.name: FORBIDDEN_FOLDER_PRESENT
compliance_rules.description: Forbidden folder names detected anywhere in repo: utils/, helpers/, common/, shared/, lib/, misc/.

compliance_rules.name: PROHIBITED_EXECUTION_SURFACE
compliance_rules.description: Prohibited execution surfaces at repo root: bin/, tools/, lambda/, functions/, workers/, jobs/, cron/.

compliance_rules.name: SCOPE_EXCEEDED
compliance_rules.description: Artifact execution modified files outside declared allowed_paths or scope boundaries.

compliance_rules.name: PRD_STALE
compliance_rules.description: PRD or OSAM not updated within 30 days of src/ change.

compliance_rules.name: ERD_STALE
compliance_rules.description: ERD or SCHEMA.md not updated within 14 days of schema registry change.

compliance_rules.name: OSAM_STALE
compliance_rules.description: OSAM not updated within 30 days of data layer change.

compliance_rules.name: COLUMN_REGISTRY_STALE
compliance_rules.description: column_registry not updated within 7 days of SQL change.

compliance_rules.name: DBA_GATE_BYPASSED
compliance_rules.description: Schema change merged without passing DBA Gate A (non-structural) and/or Gate B (structural) checks.

compliance_rules.name: TEMPLATE_IMMUTABILITY_VIOLATED
compliance_rules.description: Locked template file was modified by an AI agent or without ADR approval.
